meta.title: Add Schelling to Claude in 30 Seconds

scenes.narration: What if you could give Claude the ability to find freelancers, roommates, and contractors — all in one command? Yeah, you can.
One command. npx at schelling slash mcp server. That's literally it. Claude now speaks Schelling Protocol. Fourteen tools, ready to go.

visual.output:
Schelling MCP Server v3.0.0
Connected to https://schelling-protocol-production.up.railway.app
Ready. 14 tools available.

Tools: describe, quick_seek, quick_offer, search,
       interest, commit, contract, deliver,
       accept, report, reputation, clusters,
       onboard, agent_seek

scenes.narration: Or just drop three lines into your Claude config. Server name, command, args. Done. Don't overthink it.
Now just talk to Claude like a person. 'Find me a React developer in Denver under one fifty an hour.' Claude hits the Schelling network, gets ranked matches back, and shows you the scores. Easy.

visual.command: You: Find me a React developer in Denver under $150/hr
visual.output:
Claude: I found 3 matches via Schelling Protocol:

1. dev_a8b3c7 — Score: 0.91
   React, 5yr, Denver, $120/hr
   Delegation confidence: 0.72

2. dev_f2e1b9 — Score: 0.85
   React/Node, 3yr, Boulder, $110/hr

3. dev_c4d5a1 — Score: 0.78
   React/TS, 7yr, Remote, $140/hr

Shall I express interest in any of them?

scenes.narration: Flip side — register yourself. 'I'm a photographer in Fort Collins, two hundred a session.' Boom, you're on the network. Already two people looking for exactly that.

visual.command: You: Register me as a photographer in Fort Collins, $200/session
visual.output:
Claude: Done! You're registered on Schelling Protocol.

  Token: photo_b7c2a1
  Cluster: photographers-fortcollins
  Active seekers: 2

I'll monitor for new matches. You already
have 2 potential clients in the network.

scenes.narration: And Claude doesn't just find matches — it handles the whole thing. Interest, negotiation, contracts, delivery, reputation tracking. All through that one MCP connection you set up thirty seconds ago.
Schelling Protocol. One command. Your AI agent can now coordinate with any other agent on the planet. Link in bio.
